subject: Resource limit:DCAE config
commit_message:
Resource limit:DCAE config

resolving merge conflict by implementing common resource
template

Issue-ID: OOM-1151

Change-Id: I3e2eac98ec1298d366a9a6b83f2a2d3a9846bd1f
Signed-off-by: vaibhav_16dec <vaibhav.chopra@amdocs.com>
Signed-off-by: Mandeep Khinda <mandeep.khinda@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

DCAE comes up with the small setting as shown below.  Anything that starts with "dep" is not managed by helm and is spawned by the cloudify manager.
These cloudify spawned resources do not have any resource limits set so there will be a JIRA raised on that.
